user_facing_message_transcript.text: I can help interpret EEG data and prepare a training-ready dataset.
Choose a file, folder, BIDS root, or saved recipe before I can scan it.
Training is not ready until data, epochs, a dataset, a model, and settings are ready.
The dataset and training settings are ready; evaluation needs a completed run.
I need a source scan before previewing. I scanned the selected source again.

ui_quality_review.visible_text_boundary: Checks visible widget text for raw tool syntax, schema, traceback, and selected snake_case command leakage.
ui_quality_review.human_design_review_boundary: This is automated UI-observable evidence. It does not replace a human desktop review of Windows launcher, dual-monitor/DPI, or long local-model sessions.

resource_smoke.boundary: Coarse process smoke only: RSS uses ru_maxrss high-water mark and this does not prove the absence of leaks.
